title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
Company Overview
 



 SmartRun Technologies helps manufacturers accelerate their digital transformation journeys by improving factory efficiency, ensuring process compliance, and driving sustainability goals. We bridge the gap between Manufacturing and IT with our strong domain and technology expertise. Our SmartRun 4\\.0 platform integrates AI, Computer Vision, IIoT, and Data Analytics to deliver actionable insights and operational excellence.
 



  





 Roles \\& Responsibilities:
 



  





 JD for 1\\-3 Years Experience
 



  





 Role: Software Engineer (Full Stack)
 



  





 Experience: 1 to 3 years
 



  





 Domain: Manufacturing
 



  





 Education
 



  





 •  BE / BTech / MCA from a recognized university
 



  





 Technical Skills
 



  





**Must Have:** 




  





 •  Strong programming experience in Java / J2EE with hands\\-on knowledge of Spring Framework or Spring Boot for developing robust backend applications
 



  





 •  Solid experience in building responsive and interactive user interfaces using React.js or Angular
 



  





 •  Good understanding of RESTful API development, integration, and consumption
 



  





 •  Experience working with relational databases (SQL) and basic knowledge of NoSQL databases (MongoDB preferred)
 



  





 •  Proficiency in using Git for version control and collaborative development
 



  





 Good to Have:
 



  





 •  Working knowledge of Python (using FastAPI, Flask, or Django) for building backend services, automation scripts, or data processing tasks
 



  





 •  Exposure to Microservices architecture and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
 



  





 •  Basic understanding of mobile application development using React Native or Flutter
 



  





 •  Familiarity with Generative AI tools (such as ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Claude) to enhance coding productivity and basic exposure to AI\\-powered features using Python
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 •  Design, develop, and maintain full\\-stack features for manufacturing applications covering frontend, backend, and database components
 



  





 •  Convert UX/UI designs into clean, responsive, and user\\-friendly interfaces
 



  





 •  Develop and integrate RESTful APIs to connect frontend with backend services and third\\-party systems
 



  





 •  Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code while following best coding practices
 



  





 •  Perform unit testing and actively support end\\-to\\-end functional testing of the application
 



  





 •  Utilize Generative AI tools to accelerate development, debugging, and documentation processes
 



  





 •  Collaborate with team members to understand requirements and deliver high\\-quality solutions
 



  





 Soft Skills Required
 



  





 •  Excellent verbal and written communication skills to clearly articulate technical ideas and collaborate with cross\\-functional teams
 



  





 •  Strong learning agility with a genuine passion to learn and apply new technologies quickly
 



  





 •  Analytical and problem\\-solving mindset to troubleshoot issues effectively
 



  





 •  High sense of ownership and accountability towards assigned tasks and deliverables
 



  





 •  Ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a collaborative team environment
 



  





  





 JD for 5\\-7 Years Experience
 



  





 Role: Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack)
 



  





 Experience: 5 to 7 years
 



  





 Domain: Manufacturing
 



  





 Education
 



  





 •  BE / BTech / MCA (preferred)
 



  





 Technical Skills
 



  





 Must Have:
 



  





 •  Strong expertise in Java / J2EE ecosystem with deep hands\\-on experience in Spring Boot for building scalable enterprise applications
 



  





 •  Advanced experience in developing modern, high\\-performance user interfaces using React.js
 



  





 •  Solid experience in designing and implementing Microservices architecture and RESTful/GraphQL APIs
 



  





 •  Strong knowledge of both SQL databases and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cassandra, etc.)
 



  





 •  Proven experience in deploying and managing applications on cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
 



  





 Strong Advantage / Good to Have:
 



  





 •  Proficiency in Python (FastAPI, Flask, or Django) for developing AI/ML\\-integrated services, automation, and data\\-intensive backend solutions
 



  





 •  Hands\\-on experience integrating AI/ML and Generative AI technologies (LLMs, Prompt Engineering, RAG, OpenAI APIs, LangChain, etc.)
 



  





 •  Working knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and advanced CI/CD pipelines
 



  





 •  Prior exposure to building intelligent manufacturing solutions such as predictive maintenance, intelligent dashboards, or automation systems
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 •  Take complete ownership of end\\-to\\-end software design, development, and delivery of complex modules in the manufacturing domain
 



  





 •  Translate complex manufacturing business requirements (Production, Quality, Maintenance, Supply Chain, etc.) into scalable and efficient technical solutions
 



  





 •  Design robust architecture, database models, and APIs while ensuring adherence to industry best practices
 



  





 •  Perform thorough code reviews, enforce coding standards, and maintain high code quality across the team
 



  





 •  Set up and continuously improve CI/CD pipelines, code versioning, and automated deployment processes
 



  





 •  Leverage Python and Generative AI tools to build intelligent features and accelerate development cycles
 



  





 •  Mentor junior developers, share knowledge, and contribute to technical documentation and architecture decisions
 



  





 Soft Skills Required
 



  





 •  Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to interact confidently with stakeholders and technical teams
 



  





 •  Strong analytical, problem\\-solving, and decision\\-making abilities to handle complex technical challenges
 



  





 •  High passion for learning and experimenting with emerging technologies, especially AI and cloud solutions
 



  





 •  Demonstrated ownership, accountability, and ability to deliver under minimal supervision
 



  





 •  Mentoring mindset with willingness to guide and develop junior team members
 



  





 •  Ability to understand manufacturing domain pain points and effectively translate them into innovative technology solutions
 



  
 



 Regards,
 



 Ijas.i
 



 Interested candidates you can share your resume to the below email id.
 



 Email id : ijas.i@smartruntech.com
 



 Mobile: 9176843000

title: Sr. Software Engineer (Java / Backend)
description:
**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable Java/J2EE applications using technologies including Hibernate, Spring Framework, REST APIs, Servlets, multithreading, and socket programming
* Take end\\-to\\-end ownership of development tasks, from requirement analysis through implementation, testing, deployment, and production support
* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-tested code; participate actively in peer code reviews and promote engineering best practices across the team
* Apply secure coding practices and contribute to application\\-level security, including participation in vulnerability assessments, static analysis reviews, and remediation of security findings
* Work within the CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins, ensuring code is built, tested, and deployed in a consistent and repeatable manner
* Troubleshoot and debug complex technical issues, ensuring timely resolution in collaboration with QA and support teams
* Participate in technical design reviews and contribute to improving code quality, performance, and system reliability
* Work closely with product managers, QA, and cross\\-functional teams to translate functional requirements into sound technical solutions
* Continuously explore and recommend new frameworks, tools, or libraries that can improve development efficiency and maintainability
* Engage actively in sprint planning, estimation, retrospectives, and daily stand\\-ups
* Contribute to a knowledge\\-sharing culture through documentation, design discussions, and team collaboration
* Takes initiative in identifying and addressing technical challenges early, proactively flagging risks to timelines and working with the team to resolve blockers before they escalate
* Comfortable working in a fast\\-paced Agile/Scrum environment, taking ownership of sprint commitments and consistently delivering well\\-tested, production\\-ready code on time, adapting quickly to shifting priorities without compromising on quality


**Qualifications**
**Required:**
* B.Tech / M.Tech in Computer Science or equivalent
* 5\\-7 years of software development experience with strong Java/J2EE fundamentals
* Extensive hands\\-on experience in Java, J2EE, Spring Framework, Hibernate, Servlets, REST APIs, JavaScript, multithreading, and socket programming
* Familiarity with service\\-oriented or microservices architectures, message queues, caching strategies, and distributed system design
* Strong command of design patterns, data structures, and object\\-oriented principles
* Extensive working experience in secure coding practices and application\\-level security, including vulnerability assessment, static analysis, dynamic testing, and third\\-party library security review
* Experience with Oracle or SQL Server databases\\-writing complex SQL, stored procedures, and performance tuning
* Experience with JBoss / WildFly application server; familiarity with Windows Server or Linux hosting environments
* Experience with unit testing, TDD, and automation frameworks (JUnit or equivalent)
* Experience using SVN, Git, JIRA, Jenkins, and CI/CD tools
* Excellent problem\\-solving, communication, and technical leadership skills


**Nice To Have**
* Working knowledge of Angular and Frontend components\\- sufficient to understand frontend integration points and collaborate effectively with frontend engineers
* Familiarity with C\\+\\+ or experience integrating Java applications with native / C\\+\\+ components via SOAP or similar protocols
* Experience with JSP in a legacy enterprise application context

title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description:
**About This Job**
**Vishay Intertechnology, Inc.**
**Location:** 
 Pune City, Maharashtra, India
   

  

**Work Mode:** 
 On\\-site
   

  

**Industry:** 
 Appliances, Electrical, and Electronics Manufacturing,Technology, Information and Media,Software Development
   

  

**Job Description**
 Role Summary
   

  

 The AI Engineer contributes to the end\\-to\\-end delivery of AI/ML solutions within the Office of Innovation, working alongside broader platform teams. This role spans model development support, GenAI application building, infrastructure automation, and governance tooling, making it an ideal position for an engineer ready to deepen expertise across the full AI delivery stack. The successful candidate is technically sharp, eager to grow, and comfortable operating in a fast\\-paced innovation environment within a global enterprise.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 AI/ML Model Development
   

  

* Build, train, and evaluate ML models, contributing to the full model lifecycle from data preparation through to deployment.
* Conduct exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and model experimentation; document findings clearly.
* Support model validation, testing, and performance benchmarking activities, Generative AI \\& LLM Applications.
* Develop and maintain GenAI\\-powered applications including chatbots, summarization tools, document processing pipelines, and internal copilots.
* Implement prompt engineering patterns, retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, and tool\\-augmented agents using established frameworks.
* Participate in the evaluation of new LLM capabilities and contribute to internal proof\\-of\\-concepts.


 AI Infrastructure \\& ML Ops
   

  

* Support the building and maintenance of ML pipelines, including data ingestion, preprocessing, training automation, and model serving.
* Manage and monitor deployed models; identify and escalate performance degradation, drift, or anomalies.
* Contribute to infrastructure\\-as\\-code for AI workloads across cloud environments (AWS, Azure, or GCP).AI Governance \\& Quality.
* Assist in producing governance documentation: model cards, data lineage records, and risk assessment inputs.
* Implement monitoring and logging frameworks to support auditability and compliance requirements.
* Apply responsible AI checklists and flag potential bias, fairness, or privacy concerns during development.


 Collaboration \\& Delivery
   

  

* Work closely with data engineers, platform engineers, and business analysts to integrate AI outputs into existing systems.
* Participate in Agile ceremonies, sprint planning, and technical design discussions.
* Write clean, well\\-documented, testable code and maintain internal technical documentation.


**Qualifications**
 Essential
   

  

* 3 to 5 years of software engineering experience with at least 1 or 2 years in ML or AI\\-focused roles.
* Solid skills with hands\\-on experience in ML libraries (scikit\\-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow, pandas, NumPy).
* Working knowledge of LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace) and at least one orchestration framework (LangChain, LlamaIndex).
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization basics (Docker).
* Experience with version control (Git), basic CI/CD practices, and collaborative development workflows.
* Understanding of core ML concepts: supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, overfitting, and feature engineering.
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field — or equivalent demonstrable experience.


 Desirable
   

  

* Exposure to MLOps tools such as MLflow, DVC, or Weights \\& Biases.
* Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector) for semantic search or RAG applications.
* Familiarity with responsible AI principles, bias detection methods, or model explainability


 tools.
   

  

* Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, or GCP) at associate level or above.
* Experience in an enterprise IT environment (ITSM, infrastructure, networking) is a


 plus.

title: VP- Release Train Engineer/Tech Program Manager (L12)
description:
**Role Title:** 
 VP\\- Release Train Engineer/Tech Program Manager (L12\\)
   

  

**Company Overview :** 
 Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) is a premier consumer financial services company delivering one of the industry’s most complete digitally enabled product suites. Our experience, expertise and scale encompass a broad spectrum of industries including digital, health and wellness, retail, telecommunications, home, auto, outdoors, pet and more.
   

  

* We have recently been ranked \\#2 among India’s Best Companies to Work for by Great Place to Work. We were among the Top 50 India’s Best Workplaces in Building a Culture of Innovation by All by GPTW and Top 25 among Best Workplaces in BFSI by GPTW. We have also been recognized by AmbitionBox Employee Choice Awards among the Top 20 Mid\\-Sized Companies, ranked \\#3 among Top Rated Companies for Women, and Top\\-Rated Financial Services Companies.
* We provide best\\-in\\-class employee benefits and programs that cater to work\\-life integration and overall well\\-being.
* We provide career advancement and upskilling opportunities for all to take up leadership roles.


**Organizational Overview**
 We are seeking a dynamic VP, SAFe Release Train Engineer (RTE) to lead multiple Agile Release Trains composed of Scrum and Kanban teams focused on ServiceNow \\& workforce experience. The ideal candidate will drive agile execution, aligning teams to business outcomes, accelerating value delivery, and enhancing operational resiliency. This leadership role requires expertise in SAFe practices, DevOps integration, and scaling Agile in regulated industries such as financial services or energy. Strong servant leadership, stakeholder collaboration, and continuous improvement skills are essential.
   

  

**Role Summary/Purpose**
 Lead Agile Scrum/Kanban teams focused on the ServiceNow platform, driving modernization and governance to deliver critical IT service solutions. Coach teams on Agile best practices, enforce governance standards, and collaborate with senior leaders to ensure successful project delivery and alignment with enterprise goals. Drive innovation, process improvements, and sustainable outcomes supporting mission\\-critical initiatives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead large/enterprise Agile initiative, utilizing the Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe)
* Facilitate and continuously align a large development program.
* Provide active, hands\\-on management of scrum master's and project coordinators may be direct or indirect reports
* Manage risk to ensure value delivery
* Facilitate PI planning events
* Track execution of features and capabilities
* Identify process gaps; plan, execute and drive process enhancements
* Coach leaders, teams and scrum masters in lean/Agile practices and mindset
* Plan and communicate with business, IT Leadership, and other key stakeholders regarding agile program status, milestones, issue resolution, and escalation.
* Interact with business users to gather/validate requirements/epics and develop detailed roadmap that meets business objectives.
* Lead, manage and direct cross\\-functional resources (IT and Business) as required throughout agile lifecycle
* Create an overall Agile program plan that tracks critical program milestones/releases.
* Oversee new dependencies, risks, and priority changes that are introduced to the Agile program.
* Develop effective communication strategy across projects and constituencies.
* Perform other duties and/or special projects as assigned


**Required Skills/Knowledge**
* Minimum 6\\-8 years of experience as a Scrum Master for software development teams, consistently applying Scrum principles and performing RTE or equivalent role
* At least 2 years of direct experience as a Release Train Engineer (RTE), with a track record of successfully launching and managing three or more Program Increments (PIs) in a SAFe environment.
* Experience in running Infrastructure Program


**Skills And Expertise**
****SAFe Mastery:** 
 Deep, hands\\-on expertise in applying and tailoring the Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) to optimize value delivery at the program level.**
* Tooling: Expert\\-level proficiency with tools such as Jira and Jira Align for managing Agile Release Trains (ART), including generating program\\-level metrics.
* Communication \\& Conflict Resolution: Outstanding oral and written communication skills, with demonstrated ability to facilitate discussions and resolve conflicts among teams and stakeholders.
* Servant Leadership: Proven servant leadership capabilities, including facilitation, situational awareness, conflict resolution, and a commitment to continuous improvement.


**Desired Skills/Knowledge**
* Advanced Certifications:
* SAFe Program Consultant (SPC) or other advanced SAFe certifications, such as SAFe Advanced Scrum Master (SASM)
* Domain Expertise:
* Prior experience working in the financial services – Service now domain


**Eligibility Criteria**
 Minimum 6\\-8 years of experience as a Scrum Master for software development teams, consistently applying Scrum principles and performing RTE or equivalent role.
   

  

**WORK TIMINGS** 
 : 2PM to 11PM IST
   

  

 (This role qualifies for Enhanced Flexibility and Choice offered in Synchrony India and will require the incumbent to be available between 06:00 AM Eastern Time – 11:30 AM Eastern Time (timings are anchored to US Eastern hours and will adjust twice a year locally). This window is for meetings with India and US teams. The remaining hours will be flexible for the employee to choose from. Exceptions may apply periodically due to business needs. Please discuss this with the hiring manager for more details.
   

  

**For Internal Applicants**
* Understand the criteria or mandatory skills required for the role, before applying
* Inform your manager and HRM before applying for any role on Workday
* Ensure that your professional profile is updated (fields such as education, prior experience, other skills) and it is mandatory to upload your updated resume (Word or PDF format)
* Must not be on any corrective action plan (First Formal/Final Formal, LPP)
* L10\\+ Employees who have completed 18 months in the organization and 12 months in current role and level are only eligible.
* L10\\+ Employees can apply.


**Level / Grade : 12**
**Job Family Group**
 Information Technology
